intro: Zaccur is a name shared by several biblical figures. (1.) The father of Shammua, the spy sent from the tribe of Reuben to explore Canaan (Numbers 13:4). (2.) A son of Imri, who helped repair the wall of Jerusalem under Nehemiah (Nehemiah 3:2). (3.) A Levite who set his seal to the covenant under Nehemiah (Nehemiah 10:12). (4.) A Levite musician and son of Asaph (1 Chronicles 25:2, 10; Nehemiah 12:35). (5.) A son of Mattaniah, one of the treasury overseers under Nehemiah (Nehemiah 13:13). The name means mindful or remembered.
